title: Natura
summary: Mountains, rivers, and the natural world.

teach.target: Nos ha ascendite le montania e vidite le mar.
teach.roman: nos ha ascendite le montania e vidite le mar
teach.english: We climbed the mountain and saw the sea.
teach.ipa: nˈos ha ˌastsendˈite le montˈanja e vidˈite le mˈar

teach.target: Le insula ha multe arbores e flores belle.
teach.roman: le insula ha multe arbores e flores belle
teach.english: The island has many trees and beautiful flowers.
teach.ipa: le ˈinsula ha mˈulte ˈarbores e flˈores bˈele

reading.title: Un die in le montania
passage: Anna e Marco ha vadite al montania con lor amico.
Illes ha ascendite le montania e ha vidite un fluvio inter le arbores.
Le sol esseva calide, ma un vento frigide veniva del mar.
Sur un petra presso del fluvio, illes ha comenciate a mangiar.
"Esserea agradabile vader ci cata septimana," ha dicite Anna.
Marco ha respondite: "Si, ma le proxime vice, io vole trovar le mar!"

questions.prompt: Where did Anna and Marco go?
What did they see between the trees?

choices: On a rock near the river

questions.prompt: What does Marco want to find next time?

canDo: Talk about mountains, rivers, and the sea
Talk about trees, flowers, and islands
